Halfling.Gui.Widget.DockMode: Which edge of its parent this widget will be docked to when placed in a WidgetDockedChildren list.
Halfling.Gui.Widget.IgnoreInLayout: Whether this widget will be ignored during automatic widget layout.
Halfling.Gui.Widget.InputBlockMode: Whether this widget blocks user input to widgets underneath it.
Halfling.Gui.Widget.RenderSettings: The settings that control how this Widget will be rendered. Settings specified here will be inherited by all child components and widgets.
Halfling.Gui.Widget.Animator: The object that controls how this widget is animated.
Halfling.Gui.Widget.Triggers: The collection of triggers attached to this widget.
Halfling.Gui.Widget.ToolTips: The settings for displaying mouse-over tool tips for this widget.
Halfling.Gui.Widget.ToolTipDisplay: The object that displays tool tips for this widget and any child widgets that don't themselves have a ToolTipDisplay set.
Halfling.Gui.Widget.AutoSize: The settings for how this widget is automatically sized.
Halfling.Gui.Widget.CustomShapeFunc: The function used to determine whether a mouse cursor is "inside of" this Widget. A null value will simply check against this Widget's ScreenRect.
Halfling.Gui.Widget.UserData: An arbitrary data object attached to this Widget. The user application can attach anything it likes to this property.

Halfling.Gui.WindowBox`1.TitleBox: The LayoutBox that contains the title bar, title, and window buttons.
Halfling.Gui.WindowBox`1.TitleLabel: The Label that displays the title text in the TitleBox.
Halfling.Gui.WindowBox`1.CloseButton: The Button that can be used to close this WindowBox.
Halfling.Gui.WindowBox`1.DragController: The settings for the component that controls dragging this WindowBox via its title bar.
Halfling.Gui.WindowBox`1.ResizeController: The settings for the component that controls resizing this WindowBox via its edges.
Halfling.Gui.WindowBox`1.RaiseController: The settings for the component that controls when and whether this WindowBox is raised to the front of its parent.
Halfling.Gui.WindowBox`1.TitleText: The text to display on the TitleLabel in the TitleBox. This is synonymous with TitleLabel.TextRenderer.Text.
Halfling.Gui.WindowBox`1.TitleTextProvider: An ITextProvider object that, if not null, will keep this WindowBox's TitleText property updated to match the ITextProvider.
Halfling.Gui.WindowBox`1.AutoClose: Whether this WindowBox should be automatically closed when its CloseButton is clicked.
